name: ASRock Z790 PG Riptide ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - M.2 Key-E for WiFi - Support DDR5-6800+(OC) - 5x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen2 Type-A - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Killer 2.5G LAN - USB 3.2 Gen2x2 Type-C (Front)
shortName: ASRock Z790 PG Riptide ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - 1x PCIe
description: ATX Z790 motherboard for Intel LGA 1700 socket, designed for high-performance gaming with DDR5 and extensive M.2 support.
